introSection: Excalibur is a steel hybrid roller coaster located at Valleyfair in Shakopee, Minnesota, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
In August 1988, Valleyfair announced that Excalibur would be added for the 1989 season.

The ride opened on May 6, 1989. A few years after it opened, trim brakes were added at the top of the first hill. The bottom and first half of the turn were re-profiled in an attempt to reduce roughness.

fullText:
Excalibur is a steel hybrid roller coaster located at Valleyfair in Shakopee, Minnesota, USA.

In August 1988, Valleyfair announced that Excalibur would be added for the 1989 season.

The ride opened on May 6, 1989. A few years after it opened, trim brakes were added at the top of the first hill. The bottom and first half of the turn were re-profiled in an attempt to reduce roughness.



Grey track and unpainted supports.
